name: Il Capitano
description:
Husband Capitano! Or more like sleepy husband Capitano.

The terrifying man himself has fallen asleep in the living room after a long time away from home, how will he react when you wake him up?

Personal anecdotes; I love wholesome Capitano as much as I love the more aggressive bots. I just wish we had more scenarios where you could just hang out with him, you know? If anything breaks let me know!

Art Credits: fruberry01 on Reddit!
creator: Crows
